role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (deciduous trees, pastures) without drifting.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Fagus/Quercus) and forest biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (fencing style, road width) and architecture.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (fencing + architecture) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United Kingdom. The specialists provided grounded, image-consistent evidence (fencing, trees, architecture) and the tournament successfully used this evidence to distinguish the UK from close analogs like Belgium and France.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of trees, grass, and soil match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of dormant broadleaf trees match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the wooden fence and brick house match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Synthesis of visual cues is consistent with the image.
